text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I missed the Umasta livestream I wanted to watch.
My favorite nail artist was on...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: It's not archived either. Sigh... What a drag.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Recently, it's just been racing this, racing that...
It's like I don't have time for anything else. It
sucks...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She appears to be so physically and mentally
exhausted that she's even forgetting things she's
looking forward to... It might be a good idea to
rethink her race schedule.
